title: Green and yellow gharara for a mehndi
concept_summary: A joyful, festive mehndi concept in fresh green and sunlit yellow, built on a true gharara silhouette. The trousers stay fitted through the upper leg and knee before opening into a dramatic flare, with lively gota patti and mirror work carrying the celebratory mood.

garment_breakdown.overall_form: A short kurti worn over gharara trousers with a light draped dupatta.
garment_breakdown.silhouette: Fitted through the upper leg and knee, then flaring wide below the knee in the gharara manner.
garment_breakdown.drape_or_layering: A single dupatta rests over one shoulder to keep movement free for dancing.
garment_breakdown.key_proportions: The short kurti balances the volume of the flared gharara legs below the knee.

colour_story.palette_summary: Fresh green and warm yellow lifted with gold accents.
colour_story.placement: Green leads on the kurti, yellow carries the gharara flare, and gold outlines the borders.
colour_story.rationale: Bright green and yellow feel celebratory for a mehndi, with gold tying the two tones together.

fabrics_and_texture.finish_and_movement: A light, fluid fabric that swishes with the flared legs and moves easily while dancing.

embellishment_plan.density: A rich, heavier spread of work suited to the festive brief.
motifs: Small round mirrors set in floral clusters
embellishment_plan.restraint_notes: Even the heavier work leaves breathing space so the mirrors read as sparkle, not clutter.

coverage_and_drape.neckline: A comfortable round neckline that suits an energetic celebration.
coverage_and_drape.back_and_midriff: The short kurti sits at the hip with a modest closed back.
coverage_and_drape.head_covering: No head covering was requested, so the dupatta stays on one shoulder.
coverage_and_drape.dupatta_or_saree_drape: A single light dupatta over one shoulder.

interpretation_notes: No specific regional direction was chosen, so styling stays broadly celebratory.
safeguards: The gharara is kept distinct from a sharara, and no single community's custom is treated as universal.

styling_notes: Layer fine gold bangles for movement.
Loose, soft waves keep the look relaxed for dancing.
construction_caveats: This is a concept visualisation only and is not a sewing pattern.
No measurements are provided and constructibility exactly as shown is not guaranteed.
image_alt_text: A model in a green kurti with a yellow gharara flaring below the knee, with gota patti and mirror work, at a mehndi.
